name: Upside-Down Cranberry-Apple Coffee Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the first six ingredients and spoon into a greased 8-inch round cake pan.
2. Set aside.
3. In a mixing bowl, combine flour with the remaining ingredients.
4. Beat at medium speed with an electric mixer for 2 minutes.
5. Spoon over the cranberry mixture.
6. Bake at 350 degrees Fahrenheit for 55 minutes or until a wooden pick inserted in the center comes out clean.
7. Cool in pan on a wire rack for 5 minutes.
8. Remove from pan and serve warm if desired. Yield: 1 (8-inch) coffee cake.
